goal: Verify that collinear contour compression reduces CAD export load without changing the foreground pixel result.

rendering.removed_points: Only intermediate points on unchanged horizontal, vertical, or diagonal runs.

historical_combined_modelspace_benchmark.status: Historical contour-performance measurement only; this is not the active GUI multi-page export layout.
historical_combined_modelspace_benchmark.output_at_time_of_measurement: one DXF containing all seven pages in model space plus lightweight PAGE viewports
historical_combined_modelspace_benchmark.note: These measurements are retained as historical engineering evidence and are not a performance guarantee for Windows computers.

active_export_strategy.multi_page_pdf: one independent DXF or DWG file per PDF page
active_export_strategy.reason: Prevents page coordinate, viewport, and layer overlap in LibreCAD and AutoCAD.
active_export_strategy.ocr_text: one native editable DXF TEXT entity per approved non-space Unicode character
active_export_strategy.font_note: Unicode content and editability are portable; exact glyph appearance depends on fonts available in the receiving CAD environment.

verification.method: Rebuild the foreground image from the retained contour hierarchy with cv2.drawContours(..., FILLED) and compare every pixel.
verification.result: All seven pages reconstructed with 0 differing pixels.
